description_long: This is a modern two-story house surrounded by a dense perimeter of tall, conical evergreen trees, creating a private and enclosed yard. The house features a flat roof, large rectangular windows, and a beige exterior with white trim. The front yard includes a paved driveway and a small landscaped area, while the backyard contains a swimming pool and a patio space. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, with some grouped together and others spaced apart. The main entryway is partially obscured by landscaping but appears to have a simple, modern door with a small overhang. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open outdoor spaces, and privacy from the surrounding environment.
description: A modern, flat-roofed two-story house with large windows, beige walls, and a private yard enclosed by tall evergreen trees. Features include a driveway, landscaped front, and a backyard pool.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, driveway, and a landscaped area with trees tightly enclosing the property.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the backyard with a swimming pool and patio, as well as more windows and the continuation of the tree fence.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights a large vertical garden or trellis on the house wall and the dense tree enclosure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the driveway entrance, garage area, and the flat roof structure with visible skylights.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple modern door with a small overhang, partially obscured by landscaping and trees
